chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِرَجُلٍ "أَصْبَحْتَ صَائِماً" قَالَ لاَ قَالَ "فَعُدْتَ مَرِيضاً" قَالَ لاَ قَالَ "فَاتَّبَعْتَ جَنَازَةً" قَالَ لاَ قَالَ "فَأَطْعَمْتَ مِسْكِيناً" قَالَ لاَ قَالَ "فَارْجِعْ إِلَى أَهْلِكَ فَأَصِبْهُمْ فَإِنَّهُ مِنْكَ عَلَيْهِمْ صَدَقَةٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3673 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said to a man:
"Did you wake up fasting?"
He replied: "No."
He (sw) said: "Then did you visit a sick person?"
He replied: "No."
He (sw) said: "Then did you follow a funeral procession?"
He replied: "No."
He (sw) said: "Then did you feed a poor person?"
He replied: "No."
He (sw) said: "Then return to your family and be with them, for that is a charity from you to them."
